task: Add input validation to the schematic upload API endpoint to reject files larger than 10MB
Add a rate limit response header (X-RateLimit-Remaining) to the middleware response
Add a character limit of 5000 to the comment form and show a character counter
Add a 'copy link' button to the circuit detail page that copies the URL to clipboard
Add a loading skeleton to the search results page while results are being fetched
Add a 'recently viewed' section to the user profile page that shows the last 10 circuits they viewed
Add full-text search filtering by license type to the search API and search page
Add an API endpoint that returns similar circuits based on shared tags, and show them on the circuit detail page
Add comment notification badges to the header showing unread comment count for the logged-in user
Add a circuit download feature that generates a .kicad_sch file from the stored S-expression data
Add a 'sort by' dropdown to the browse page with options for recent, popular, most viewed, and most copied
Add a bulk tag editor to the admin dashboard that lets admins update tags for multiple circuits at once
Add an RSS feed endpoint at /api/feed that returns the 20 most recently added circuits
Add input validation using Zod to the circuit edit API endpoint, validating title length, tag count, and description format
Add a circuit comparison view that shows two schematics side by side using KiCanvas
Refactor the search system to support faceted filtering by category, tag, license, and component count, with counts for each facet
Add circuit versioning: allow users to update schematics while keeping a history of previous versions accessible
Replace the in-memory rate limiter with a sliding window rate limiter backed by Supabase, persisting rate limit state across serverless invocations
Add a circuit fork feature: users can fork another user's circuit, creating a linked copy with attribution tracking and a fork graph
Add real-time collaborative commenting using Supabase Realtime subscriptions, updating the comment list live without page refresh
